Package org.eventb.internal.core.ast

Class Position

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.ast.Position
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<IPosition>, IPosition
public final class Position extends Object implements IPosition
Implementation of a position in a formula. A position denotes a node in a formula tree. By extension, this node is also sometimes considered as a sub-tree, that sub-tree which is rooted at this node.

    int
    compareTo(IPosition position)
    Compares this position with the given position, using the order induces by pre-order (top-down) traversal of a formula tree.
    boolean
    equals(Object obj)
     
    Position
    getChildAtIndex(int n)
    Returns the position of the n+1th child node of the node designated by this position.
    int
    getChildIndex()
    Returns the child index of this position, related to its parent position, counting from 0 for the first child.
    Position

    Returns the position of the first child node of the node designated by this position.
    Position

    Returns the position of the next sibling node of the node designated by this position.

    Returns the position of the parent node of the node designated by this position.

    Returns the position of the previous sibling node of the node designated by this position.

    Tells whether this position denotes the first child of a formula node.

    • getRoot

      public static IPosition getRoot()

    • compareTo

      public int compareTo(IPosition position)
      Description copied from interface: IPosition
      Compares this position with the given position, using the order induces by pre-order (top-down) traversal of a formula tree.
      Specified by:
      compareTo in interface Comparable<IPosition>
      Specified by:
      compareTo in interface IPosition
      Returns:
      a negative integer, zero, or a positive integer as this position is less than, equal to, or greater than the specified position.

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object obj)
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object

    • getParent

      public IPosition getParent()
      Description copied from interface: IPosition
      Returns the position of the parent node of the node designated by this position.

      This position must not be a root position.

      Specified by:
      getParent in interface IPosition
      Returns:
      the position of the parent
      See Also:
      • IPosition.isRoot()

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()
      Overrides:
      hashCode in class Object

    • isRoot

      public boolean isRoot()
      Description copied from interface: IPosition
      Tells whether this position denotes the root of a formula.
      Specified by:
      isRoot in interface IPosition
      Returns:
      true iff this position denotes the root of a formula

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Description copied from interface: IPosition
      Returns a string representation of this position. Such a string can be persisted and this position retrieved later using the appropriate factory method.
      Specified by:
      toString in interface IPosition
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      See Also:
      • FormulaFactory.makePosition(String)

    • getFirstChild

      public Position getFirstChild()
      Description copied from interface: IPosition
      Returns the position of the first child node of the node designated by this position. No attempt is made to check that this position indeed denotes a node in some formula.
      Specified by:
      getFirstChild in interface IPosition
      Returns:
      the position of the first child

    • getNextSibling

      public Position getNextSibling()
      Description copied from interface: IPosition
      Returns the position of the next sibling node of the node designated by this position. No attempt is made to check that the returned position indeed denotes a node in some formula.

      This position must not be a root position.

      Specified by:
      getNextSibling in interface IPosition
      Returns:
      the position of the next sibling
      See Also:
      • IPosition.isRoot()

    • getPreviousSibling

      public Position getPreviousSibling()
      Description copied from interface: IPosition
      Returns the position of the previous sibling node of the node designated by this position.

      This position must not be a root position, nor a first child position.

      Specified by:
      getPreviousSibling in interface IPosition
      Returns:
      the position of the previous sibling
      See Also:
      • IPosition.isRoot()

    • isFirstChild

      public boolean isFirstChild()
      Description copied from interface: IPosition
      Tells whether this position denotes the first child of a formula node.
      Specified by:
      isFirstChild in interface IPosition
      Returns:
      true iff this position denotes the first child of a node of a formula

    • getChildAtIndex

      public Position getChildAtIndex(int n)
      Description copied from interface: IPosition
      Returns the position of the n+1th child node of the node designated by this position. No attempt is made to check that the returned position indeed denotes a node in some formula.

      Calling this method is strictly equivalent to calling IPosition.getFirstChild() followed by n calls to IPosition.getNextSibling(). The first child is thus obtained by passing 0 as argument.

      Specified by:
      getChildAtIndex in interface IPosition
      Returns:
      the position of the n+1th child

    • getChildIndex

      public int getChildIndex()
      Description copied from interface: IPosition
      Returns the child index of this position, related to its parent position, counting from 0 for the first child.

      This position must not be a root position.

      Specified by:
      getChildIndex in interface IPosition
      Returns:
      the child index of this position related to its parent
      See Also:
      • IPosition.isRoot()
